name: Souvlakia (Barbecued Meat Cubes)
recipeInstructions:
1. Arrange lamb or veal on six 8-inch skewers.
2. Place the skewers in a shallow glass baking dish.
3. Mix remaining ingredients; pour over meat.
4. Cover tightly and refrigerate, turning occasionally, for at least 12 hours but no longer than 24 hours.
5. Set oven control to broil and/or 550°F.
6. Broil 4 inches from the heat, turning and basting with marinade every 5 minutes until done, about 10 to 15 minutes.
